arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Manchester United will be 'careful' with Amad
arts.sum: Amad was already a firm fan favourite and he has gone higher up in the estimation of Man United fans after deciding the derby.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim refutes claim about Man Utd duo who were dropped: 'It was not that'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim made some bold calls to leave both Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho out of the squad vs Manchester City and has now clarified why the pair were omitted

arts.ttl: Why 'outstanding' Diallo made the difference for Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundit Danny Murphy looks at Amad Diallo's "outstanding" performance for Manchester United and why he was the difference during their 2-1 win against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Diallo's derby - how Amad made the difference for Man Utd
arts.sum: MOTD2 pundit Danny Murphy explains how Manchester United's match-winner Amad Diallo was the only player to have freedom and fearlessness in Sunday's Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Manchester United: Bruno Fernandes surpasses Wayne Rooney's record with goal for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes is now Manchester United's leading goalscorer from the penalty spot in Premier League history, surpassing Wayne Rooney's record.

arts.ttl: Man Utd keen on PSG's Kolo Muani - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United keen on PSG forward Randal Kolo Muani, Newcastle United looking at move for Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen, Leicester City plan Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall return, plus more.

arts.ttl: Man Utd beat Man City with incredible late turnaround
arts.sum: The 22-year-old drew a rash tackle from Matheus Nunes to win a penalty that Bruno Fernandes converted in the 88th minute, before scoring himself from a tight angle with stoppage time looming to hand Ruben Amorim a memorable win. Yet again, Guardiola was left stunned on the sidelines as City failed to win for the sixth time in seven Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Man City 1-2 Man United: Pep Guardiola makes worrying admission as champions set unwanted Premier League record
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says that he is "not good enough" to solve Man City's mounting problems after watching his side concede two late goals and lose 2-1 to rivals Man United, setting an unwanted record in the process.

arts.ttl: Manchester United defender sparks fresh injury worry after dramatic Man City triumph
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as possible concerns emerge over a potential injury concern to Noussair Mazraoui

arts.ttl: Man City looking into Pogba move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City weigh up a move for Paul Pogba, Newcastle United interested in West Ham's Mohammed Kudus, Bayern Munich rule out signing a Harry Kane replacement in January, plus more.
